title: Čakovec、Međimurje — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Čakovec、Međimurjeの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

ČakovecはMeđimurjeにある人口27,000の都市です。The capital of the Međimurje region, known for its Baroque Zrinski Castle, the Mura River, and a rich tradition of wine production and cultural festivals.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
